q: What makes TeamStation AI different from traditional nearshore vendors?
a: It’s an integrated platform: hiring + EOR/payroll + devices/MDM + secure workspaces + compliance/insurance, with public SLAs and cognitive evaluations.

q: Do you provide devices and MDM on day one?
a: Yes. Device MTPD ≤ 5 days, and MDM enrollment ≥ 99% within 24 hours. Every engagement includes cybersecurity & E&O insurance.

q: How do you reduce interview bias?
a: Axiom Cortex combines 44 psychometric + NLP signals with a language-fairness calibration layer, producing explainable BARS-mapped evaluations.
Median Time-to-Offer is about 9 days, with day-one onboarding and performance diagnostics under a single SLA.
Yes—45+ hubs. Programmatic pages cover country services and city/role templates; device provisioning and workspace SLAs apply region-wide.
